description: A standard bottle of strong spirits. Good for drinking, or throwing into a fire.
A pile of gold coins. Standard currency across the continent.
A highly addictive and dangerous fey narcotic. Proceed with extreme caution.
A crystalline stimulant crafted by dwarven alchemists to keep miners awake for days.
A fast-acting alchemical liquid that makes the world seem to stand still.
A glowing pink substance that induces overwhelming, unearned happiness.
A classic red potion that knits wounds and mends flesh upon consumption.
A viscous, pale liquid that aggressively expands the consumer's mass.
A robust glass flask containing a highly corrosive green acid.
A swirl of white vapor trapped in a fragile glass sphere.
Dark, angry clouds and flashes of miniature lightning violently swirl inside this reinforced jar.
A foul-smelling, incredibly slippery byproduct of goblin 'cooking'.
A small pouch of enchanted desert sand that bursts into a blinding cloud when released.
A magically preserved shard of true ice that freezes whatever it shatters against.
A radiant ointment that causes the user's skin to emit a comforting, holy light.
A luxurious, sweet-smelling cream guaranteed to clear complexions and win hearts.
A tiny, discreet vial filled with a deadly, dark-purple toxin.
An incredibly potent adhesive that permanently bonds almost anything together.
A refined ingot of strong metal, ready for the forge.
A sturdy piece of chopped wood, useful for crafting or starting a fire.
A heavy, solid chunk of rough-hewn stone.
A simple wooden arrow with an iron tip.
A lead bullet for firearms.
